synopsis: General Grievous takes center stage in issue #149 as we look at the life and times of the sinister Separatist! Best-selling Star Wars author John Jackson Miller nominates five amazing Expanded Universe characters! Get the latest, exclusive news from the making of Star Wars: Rebels and Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens! Plus all the hottest books, comics, and collectibles coming your way!
title: Insider #149
